TRANSFORMATIONS.Dialog.Title: Wild Shape
TRANSFORMATIONS.Onboarding.Title: Choose Known Forms
TRANSFORMATIONS.Onboarding.Hint: Select the beast forms your druid knows.
TRANSFORMATIONS.Transform.Title: Wild Shape
TRANSFORMATIONS.Error.NoActor: Select a token or assign a character first.
TRANSFORMATIONS.Error.NoResource: No "Wild Shape" resource found on character sheet. Add it to a resource slot.
TRANSFORMATIONS.Error.NoCompendiums: No beast compendiums configured. Ask your GM to set them in Module Settings → 5e Transformations.
TRANSFORMATIONS.Error.BeastNotFound: Could not load the beast actor from the compendium.
TRANSFORMATIONS.Error.MaxForms: You can only select up to {max} forms.
TRANSFORMATIONS.Settings.BeastCompendium: Comma-separated compendium IDs to scan for beasts (e.g. dnd5e.monsters, world.custom-beasts).
